gauge.name: Manalapan Brook at Spotswood

impacts.statement: The Immaculate Conception parking lot takes on water. Flooding increases on both Devoe and Mundy Avenues. Residential and township properties take on water. Downstream tides can affect Lake Devoe levels and subsequent flooding.

Mundy Avenue flooding increases. Devoe Avenue floods. Both roads become impassable. Flood waters approach residential and township properties. Downstream tides can affect Lake Devoe levels and subsequent flooding.
Mundy Avenue, connecting Spotswood and Old Bridge, is subject to flooding and closure. Downstream tides can affect Lake Devoe levels and subsequent flooding.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
